title: Fractions & Decimals
description: Fractions, decimals, conversions, operations, and comparisons.

title: Algebra
description: Equations, expressions, inequalities, and algebraic manipulation.

title: Exponents & Roots
description: Exponent rules, radicals, roots, squares, cubes, and simplification.

title: Geometry
description: Lines, angles, polygons, circles, area, perimeter, and volume.

title: Percents
description: Percent change, percent of a whole, discounts, markups, and comparisons.

title: Algebraic Word Problems
description: Translating GRE-style text into variables, equations, and organized solution steps.

title: Ratios & Proportions
description: Ratios, direct variation, scaling, and proportional reasoning.

title: Rates
description: Work rates, distance-rate-time, unit rates, and combined rates.

title: Statistics
description: Mean, median, mode, range, weighted averages, and data summaries.

title: Integer Properties
description: Divisibility, primes, factors, multiples, remainders, odds, and evens.

title: Sequences & Functions
description: Patterns, recursive rules, explicit formulas, and function notation.

title: Overlapping Sets
description: Venn diagrams, inclusion-exclusion, and group membership counts.

title: Combinatorics

title: Probability
description: Basic probability, complements, independent events, and combined probabilities.
